title: Availability, Disaster Recovery, and Validation · Protocol Recall
summary: Define recovery objectives and prove branch, service, configuration, and site recovery under realistic failures. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a tested network continuity plan after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define RPO and RTO from business impact and map them to backup, replication, restoration, and test requirements.
Use MTTR and MTBF as population and process indicators without treating averages as individual guarantees.
Compare cold, warm, and hot sites by readiness, data, network, staffing, cost, and activation time.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.

steps.title: Retrieve the complete evidence cycle
steps.instruction: Order the Net Rpo Rto evidence cycle before implementing it.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Net Rpo Rto assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward.

content.text: Define RPO and RTO from business impact and map them to backup, replication, restoration, and test requirements. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Check preconditions, perform the operation in an inspectable order, then verify the result and a boundary case.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Use a changed worked example case derived from this module: network resilience recovery. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. A defensible solution applies Net Rpo Rto, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to a complete first version of a tested network continuity plan while every earlier competency remains active.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: RPO measures how quickly a service must return after failure. This fails the Net Rpo Rto contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.label: Research anchor
content.value: CompTIA Network Plus N10-009 Exam Objectives (N10-009 v4.0) — Controls every certification domain, objective, acronym, tool, protocol, and performance-based scope decision.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define RPO and RTO from business impact and map them to backup, replication, restoration, and test requirements.

options.text: Define the stakeholder decision, quantities, authority, and constraints
Choose and document the smallest defensible model or procedure
Execute the model while preserving inspectable intermediate evidence
Test boundaries and changed cases, communicate limits, and revise

stimulus.title: Net Dr Testing case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Use a changed review case derived from this module: network resilience recovery. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: A written disaster-recovery plan is proven once leadership approves it.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Run tabletop and validation tests with scenarios, observers, success criteria, rollback, evidence, and remediation owners. Artifact under review: a complete first version of a tested network continuity plan while every earlier competency remains active.

options.text: The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Net Dr Testing, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

steps.title: Record what required effort
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Net Dr Testing applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Run tabletop and validation tests with scenarios, observers, success criteria, rollback, evidence, and remediation owners.

checks.description: The evidence cycle runs from problem framing through changed-case validation.
checks.failureMessage: Frame the decision before modeling, and validate after obtaining a result.
